creator: mauricio@arareko.net
text:
p5-bioperl-run-devel needs to be updated to its 1.5.2 version which requires p5-bioperl=1.5.2 (already in the ports tree), also it needs to be updated to its new Build.PL mechanism.

At the BioPerl project we are working on a new 1.6 release for all our packages, which should be available by the end of the year, I'll update the ports when this happens.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
